working_on: Routine task SQA-02 (T-SEED-QA): Shard 02 QA census — score 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1 prerequisite soundness) + 20 nodes (C2 teaching_notes traction, C3 summary cold-readability) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric; shard content read from the committed seed_qa_evidence/shards.json (routine sessions never touch the DB); write the single scope-locked evidence file.
declared_scope: Author engine/build_readiness/seed_qa_evidence/shard_02.md as candidate-findings evidence for SQA-02: one C1 verdict (Sound | Defensible | Reversed | Weak-redundant) per the 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges + C2/C3 yes/no per the 20 nodes, per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric, following the fixed evidence-file schema. Candidate findings only — no Issue filing, no migration edits, no disposition. phase: NA-routine

scope_delivery.explanation: Delivered as declared — shard_02.md authored to the fixed evidence-file schema, all 28 edges scored against C1 and all 20 nodes against C2/C3, no descope or reorder. No user confirmation (unattended routine session). One in-band Issue (#123, tech-debt/documentation — out-of-scope discovery, no tracked files touched: the /start-routine command body omits boot gates + MemPalace boot steps the Skill enumerates). The auto_target.json SQA-02 status flip rides with the close commit per the Issue #122 lifecycle-push-wrapper sequencing constraint.

side_discoveries.reasoning: The 'flagged' marker is the QA census methodology working as designed — per seed_qa_audit.md the evidence session produces candidate findings only and flags judgment-call verdicts (here the three Defensible edges E-24/E-26/E-27) for the SQA-20 closeout's consistency review. SQA-20 is already a task in auto_target.json with depends_on covering all 19 shards, so the surface exists and is structurally guaranteed to consume this. Not an undispositioned side-discovery; no routing action needed.

outcome_summary: Second routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 02 — 28 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_02.md. Findings: C1 1 Reversed/28 = 3.6% (E-15 utilitarianism->hedonism, a part-before-whole direction error, not audit-touched; notably below shard 01's 10.7% and the production audit's 13% baseline — a per-shard outlier the SQA-20 closeout watches for); C2 0/20 fail; C3 0/20 fail (uniformly high node quality). Three edges scored Defensible (E-24, E-26, E-27 — all genuine both-ways calls) and flagged for the closeout's consistency review. Candidate findings only — disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-02 marked complete; SQA-03 next. Filed Issue #123 (tech-debt/documentation): the /start-routine command body is a strict subset of the canonical routine boot procedure — it omits the boot gates (0a freshness / 0b lock / 0c wedge) and MemPalace boot steps (5.5/5.6) the routine-mode-lifecycle Skill enumerates; this session followed it literally, ran 5.5/5.6 late before shutdown (telemetry clean), but the concurrency lock was never acquired (no harm — no concurrent fire). Lesson drawer drawer_paideia_lessons_5fc40fcc5beb06d23e4b7c85 captures the subset-enumeration pattern. 0 validator hard-fails (45 checks). Prior context from boot search referenced S-0158 / S-0122.
